---
title: Portrait d'après Hockney
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784711658/portraithockney_dvf3bn.png
description: Portrait d'après le portrait de Clara de David Hockney
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2026/07/20
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784711658/portraithockney_dvf3bn.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
